infestation_levels.description: Colony infestation progression from clear to overrun

levels.name: MINOR
special_rules: Bugs flee when outnumbered 2:1
No reinforcements during missions
Easy to clear with aggressive action

levels.name: MODERATE
special_rules: Bio-matter begins accumulating in infested areas
50% chance of bug reinforcements during extended missions
Motion tracker detects increased activity
Occasional Hunter Bug patrols

levels.name: SEVERE
levels.bug_composition: 30% Workers, 30% Soldiers, 20% Hunters, 10% Spitters, 5% Heavy, 5% Flying
special_rules: Thick bio-matter covers infested zones (-2" movement in affected areas)
Visibility reduced by organic growths blocking sightlines
Guaranteed bug reinforcements every 3 rounds during missions
Environmental hazards spawn naturally
Hunter Bugs actively patrol territory

levels.name: CRITICAL
levels.bug_composition: 20% Workers, 25% Soldiers, 25% Hunters, 15% Spitters, 10% Heavy, 5% Flying
levels.hive_status: Main hive with Queen + 2D3 satellite hives
special_rules: Entire colony is hostile environment
Constant bug activity, reinforcements every 2 rounds
Environmental damage: Toxic atmosphere deals 1 damage/round to unprotected soldiers
Bio-luminescent growths eliminate darkness (bugs always visible, but so are soldiers)
Queen coordinates bug tactics (bugs gain +1 to hit)
Hive expansion: Infestation grows by 1 level every 3 missions if not stopped
levels.urgency: Must be addressed immediately or colony is lost

levels.name: OVERRUN
levels.description: Colony completely infested, evacuation only option
levels.bug_composition: All bug types in force, multiple Queens possible
levels.hive_status: Entire colony is one massive hive
special_rules: Colony is lost, all missions are desperate actions
Continuous bug spawning, no safe zones
Environmental damage: 2 damage/round from toxic atmosphere and acid
All bugs gain +1 to all stats from Queen presence
Evacuation missions to save remaining colonists
Final Assault: Suicide mission to destroy all Queens and cleanse colony
If not cleansed within 3 missions, campaign ends in defeat
levels.narrative: This is the end. Fight or flee.

infestation_progression.description: How infestation spreads if not contained

natural_growth.severe_to_critical: After 3 missions without killing bugs or destroying hives

accelerated_growth.mission_defeats: Each mission defeat increases infestation progress by 1
accelerated_growth.failed_objectives: Failed objectives count as half a defeat
accelerated_growth.bug_queen_uncontested: If Queen not engaged within 5 missions of appearing, auto-increase to OVERRUN
accelerated_growth.hive_chambers_intact: Each breeding chamber intact increases growth rate by 10%

infestation_reduction.mission_victories: Reduce infestation by 1 level after 3 consecutive victories
infestation_reduction.hive_destruction: Destroying main hive reduces infestation by 2 levels
infestation_reduction.queen_killed: Killing Queen reduces infestation by 3 levels immediately
infestation_reduction.extermination_missions: Successful EXTERMINATION missions slow growth by 50%

environmental_hazards.description: Dangerous terrain and conditions in infested zones

hazards.name: Acid Pool
hazards.effect: Any model entering or starting turn in pool takes 1D3 acid damage
hazards.special: Pool grows by 1" each round if multiple Spitters killed nearby

hazards.name: Bio-Matter Terrain
hazards.effect: Counts as difficult terrain, -2" movement, -1 to dodge rolls
hazards.special: May conceal bugs (Hunter Bugs gain +1 to stealth in bio-matter)
hazards.removal: Can be burned with flamethrower (clears 3" radius)

hazards.name: Toxic Spore Cloud
hazards.effect: Models in cloud take 1 damage at start of each round
hazards.source: Destroyed organic growths, certain bug deaths
hazards.special: Blocks line of sight through cloud

hazards.name: Organic Wall Growth
hazards.effect: Blocks movement and line of sight, treated as hard cover
hazards.growth: Expands 1" per round in high infestation zones
hazards.bug_spawning: Roll 1D6 when destroyed. On 6, spawns 1D3 Worker Bugs
hazards.special: Bugs can move through organic walls without penalty

hazards.name: Resin Webbing
hazards.effect: Models entering must pass Speed check or become entangled
hazards.entangled_effect: Cannot move, -2 to all actions while stuck
hazards.escape: Requires 1 action + Speed check to break free
hazards.special: Flammable - fire weapons auto-destroy but may damage entangled model

hazards.name: Hive Vent
hazards.effect: Bugs can emerge from vents as reinforcements
hazards.spawn_rate: Roll 1D6 each round. On 5-6, spawns 1D3 Worker Bugs
hazards.destructible: Can be sealed with explosives (requires Breach Charges or grenades)
hazards.special: Emits toxic gas (treat as Spore Cloud within 3")

hazards.name: Acidic Rain
hazards.effect: All models in open take 1 damage each round
hazards.cover_protection: Being in cover or structure negates damage
hazards.armor_interaction: Damages armor - cumulative -1 to armor save each round exposed
hazards.duration: Entire mission or until environmental condition changes
hazards.special: Reduces visibility to 18", makes stealth easier (+1 to stealth checks)

hazards.name: Bio-luminescent Growths
hazards.effect: Eliminates darkness, entire area counts as lit
hazards.tactical_impact: No hiding in shadows, stealth reduced
hazards.benefit_to_bugs: Bugs gain +1" speed due to comfortable environment
hazards.special: Growths pulse and throb, unsettling to witness (-1 to first panic check)

hive_types.name: Established Hive
hive_types.defensive_bugs: 2D6 mixed bugs, including Hunters and Heavies
hive_types.destruction_reward: 4 RP, -2 infestation progression points, reduce infestation level by 1

hive_types.name: Queen's Hive
hive_types.breeding_capacity: Spawns 2D6 bugs per day, all types
special_defenses: Queen's command aura affects all defenders

breeding_chambers.description: Individual chambers within hives that spawn bugs
destruction_methods: Sustained fire (3 rounds of concentrated fire)

chamber_destruction_effects.immediate: Spawns 2D3 Worker Bugs in death throes
chamber_destruction_effects.infestation_impact: Each chamber destroyed = -0.5 infestation progression points

chamber_types.spawns: Queen resides here, spawns all types
chamber_types.special: Cannot be destroyed while Queen lives, Queen regenerates here

growth_rate.small_nest: Becomes Established Hive after 5 missions if not destroyed
growth_rate.established_hive: Spawns new Small Nests in adjacent sectors (1 per 3 missions)
growth_rate.queens_hive: Rapidly expands infestation, +1 infestation level every 3 missions

hive_connections.effect: Bugs can move between connected hives underground
hive_connections.tactical_impact: Bugs may appear from unexpected directions
hive_connections.detection: Motion Tracker can detect tunnel vibrations (Savvy check)

infestation_zones.description: Different sectors of colony with varying infestation

zone_types.name: Residential District
zone_types.special: Higher chance of encountering Infested Humans

zone_types.name: Industrial Sector
zone_types.special: More Heavy Bugs due to stable structures for nesting

zone_types.name: Agricultural Domes
zone_types.special: Excellent visibility but little cover, Flying Bugs excel here

zone_types.name: Underground Tunnels
zone_types.terrain: Narrow corridors, service tunnels, maintenance shafts
zone_types.special: Bugs have home advantage, close quarters combat favored

zone_types.name: Spaceport
zone_types.special: Critical location - if lost, evacuation becomes impossible

zone_types.name: Administrative Center
zone_types.special: Contains valuable intel on infestation spread

zone_infestation_spread.spread_rate: One zone per 2 missions if adjacent zone is 2+ infestation levels higher
zone_infestation_spread.priority_targets: Bugs prioritize spreading to Agricultural (food), Residential (hosts), Underground (hiding)
zone_infestation_spread.defensive_measures: Successful DEFENSE missions prevent spread to that zone for 3 missions
zone_infestation_spread.containment: If all adjacent zones to infested zone are cleared, infestation cannot spread

environmental_adaptation.description: How bugs adapt to environment over time

adaptations: Bugs learn common soldier tactics (avoid overwatch, use cover)
Bugs learn to disable Motion Trackers (spore interference)
Flying Bugs attack in coordinated dive formations
Queen directs tactical responses to soldier strategies
adaptation_stages.special: Bugs counter squad's most-used tactics (+1 to defense against repeated strategies)

strategies.name: Aggressive Extermination
strategies.effectiveness: Reduces infestation by 1 level per 3 successful missions
strategies.risk: High casualty rate, soldiers gain combat stress

strategies.name: Surgical Strikes
strategies.method: Target and destroy hive chambers systematically
strategies.risk: Requires deep penetration into bug territory

strategies.name: Scorched Earth
strategies.method: Use flamethrowers and explosives to burn out entire sectors
strategies.effectiveness: Reduces infestation by 2 levels but destroys colony infrastructure
strategies.risk: Colony becomes uninhabitable, evacuation required after cleansing

strategies.name: Decapitation Strike
strategies.effectiveness: Immediate -3 infestation levels, breaks bug coordination
strategies.risk: Extremely dangerous, Queen is heavily defended

strategies.name: Containment and Attrition
strategies.method: DEFENSE missions to hold line while bugs starve
strategies.effectiveness: Slow reduction (1 level per 5 missions) but safer
strategies.risk: Time-consuming, infestation may spread if containment breaks
